modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help turning on live subtitles in PowerPoint

full_description_text:  
I’m trying to figure out how to turn on live subtitles in PowerPoint. I heard it’s a cool feature but I can’t find where to do it. Can someone help me with this? Also, why should I even use live subtitles?
short_description: Need help turning on live subtitles in PowerPoint
description: I’m trying to figure out how to turn on live subtitles in PowerPoint. I heard it’s a cool feature but I can’t find where to do it. Can someone help me with this? Also, why should I even use live subtitles?
